title: Sirloin Steak Fajitas
description: A flavorful and spicy sirloin steak fajita recipe, served with sautéed onions and bell peppers. Perfect for a quick and delicious dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onions and bell peppers to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the sliced sirloin steak to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes per side.
Add the fajita seasoning to the skillet and stir to combine.
Transfer the steak and vegetables to a plate and cover with foil to keep warm.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil to the skillet and stir in the smoky crumble and mexican crumble.
Serve the steak and vegetables with the crumble topping and your choice of sides.
